local_rationale: The live unlawful-or-allegedly-unlawful package now spans six seeded rows with four authority-led exemplars and two provisional multilingual accusation-stage leads. The least-overstated MIT AI Risk concept-layer fit remains workbook-anchor MITAIR-S4-3 because the local category is concentrated in spoofing, hidden-human transaction processing, deceptive synthetic-content misuse, fraud-adjacent market conduct, and other wrongful-use stories where targeted manipulation or advantage-seeking conduct is more visible than one shared technical failure mode; governance failure and false-information posture remain secondary rather than primary.
claim_ceiling: Concept-layer taxonomy bridge only; not an event-level external join, incident-truth claim, or blanket workbook-mirroring permission.
paper_use: Methods appendix, taxonomy heatmap, unlawful-use comparator note, and thesis claim-support map.
observatory_hook: Legal-risk heatmap by category and evidence tier plus source-bridge badge for unlawful-use rows.
negative_result: No new workbook slice, no direct MIT AI Risk incident join, no third AVID join, and no direct MITRE ATLAS same-case ID landed in this pass.
